description: Rotate rblocks about a specified axis and origin.

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: Use itasca.command('rblock rotate ...') via command interface

keywords.name: angle
keywords.description: Angle of rotation in degrees using the right-hand-rule.

keywords.name: point
keywords.description: Rotation occurs about the specified point. Should this keyword be absent, rotation occurs about the centroid of each rigid block.

keywords.name: update-orientation
keywords.description: Explicitly set the orientation update status for this rotate command. Used if orientation tracking is enabled to update the orientation. By default, the orientation is updated.
